name: =?utf-8?Q?Eric=20Greitens?=
subject: Reminder: Request Your Inaugural Invitation
body:
Peter,

Our team is preparing to send out invitations for our inaugural ceremonies. We would be honored to have you and your family join us on January 9th to celebrate the heart of Missouri. Please make sure you request your invitation today at [newmissouri.org](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=c39eae250b&e=84041254e6).

We'll be honoring some of Missouri's greatest heroes, praying at an interfaith service, swearing in our new constitutional officers, and celebrating the start of our mission to take Missouri in a new direction.

This will be a special day, and my family would be so proud to have you with us as we begin our service. Please [request an invite](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=f04e80fde8&e=84041254e6) and join us on January 9th.

Yours in Service,
Eric Greitens
A Committee for a New Missouri, Inc
PO Box #1422
Jefferson City, Missouri 65102
Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on [Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=b06d98ee39&e=84041254e6) and [Twitter](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=e053cf4376&e=84041254e6). Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=16431d3e09), but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at [team@newmissouri.org](mailto:team@newmissouri.org). You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should [volunteer](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=ea2d7694c3&e=84041254e6) with us!
clean_body: Peter, Our team is preparing to send out invitations for our inaugural ceremonies. We would be honored to have you and your family join us on January 9th to celebrate the heart of Missouri. Please make sure you request your invitation today at . We'll be honoring some of Missouri's greatest heroes, praying at an interfaith service, swearing in our new constitutional officers, and celebrating the start of our mission to take Missouri in a new direction. This will be a special day, and my family would be so proud to have you with us as we begin our service. Please and join us on January 9th. Yours in Service, Eric Greitens A Committee for a New Missouri, Inc PO Box #1422 Jefferson City, Missouri 65102 Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Democrats.org
subject: You've had his back. Now he wants to say thanks.
body:
Where can President Obama send you a thank you note? The Democratic Party**President Obama wants to send you a short note to thank you for being part of everything we've accomplished these past eight years. Let us know where to send it:

**[HERE'S MY ADDRESS](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-Note1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+HERES+MY+ADDRESS&utm_campaign=em_20161208_dnc_rem&source=em_20161208_dnc_rem")****

---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3da/4067b0a/22208ecd8/7e07a688/1207436764/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161208_dnc_rem&source=em_20161208_dnc_rem"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3da/4067b0a/22208ecd8/7e07a689/1207436764/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161208_dnc_rem&source=em_20161208_dnc_rem"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3da/4067b0a/22208ecd8/7e07a696/1207436764/VEsP/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161208_dnc_rem&source=em_20161208_dnc_rem") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3da/4067b0a/22208ecd8/7e07a697/1207436764/VEsHBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161208_dnc_rem&source=em_20161208_dnc_rem"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: =?UTF-8?Q?donaldjtrump=2Ecom?=
subject: VOTE: 2017 Membership Card Design
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I want you to vote for the card for 2017 Membership. |

Friend,

Our team has come up with two designs for our 2017 Inaugural Membership Card --__and we want you to have the final say.__

The card with the most votes will be used for our official membership rollout beginning on President-Elect Donald Trump's Inauguration Day. But hurry -- you only have until Friday to vote before our 2017 cards are sent to the printer.

VOTE for our Official 2017 Inaugural Membership Card below.
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echba2IyQFKQeCFxWga3ZdDRMN6aaaaB2SfBMES1Rea?n=8@w8y9w&l=WwppesbzzC_ZtTpe.jht&e=l&q=&y=u9tDuB30k1fw3pghnnnyTs3tXtUFVhkk3qYj30303oYFXFu&030) [**VOTE for Option 1 >>**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echba2IyQFKQeCFxWga3ZdDRMN6aaaaB2SfBMES1Rea?n=8@w8y9w&l=WwppesbzzC_ZtTpe.jht&e=m&q=&y=u9tDuB30k1fw3pghnnnyTs3tXtUFVhkk3qYj30303oYFXFu&030)
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echba2IyQFKQeCFxWga3ZdDRMN6aaaaB2SfBMES1Rea?n=8@w8y9w&l=WwppesbzzC_ZtTpe.jht&e=n&q=&y=u9tDuB30k1fw3pghnnnyTs3tXtUFVhkk3qYj30303oYFXFu&030) [**VOTE for Option 2 >>**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echba2IyQFKQeCFxWga3ZdDRMN6aaaaB2SfBMES1Rea?n=8@w8y9w&l=WwppesbzzC_ZtTpe.jht&e=o&q=&y=u9tDuB30k1fw3pghnnnyTs3tXtUFVhkk3qYj30303oYFXFu&030)

Thank you,

Brad Parscale
Digital Director
Donald Trump for President

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Tracy Newman
subject: Your status
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Jay needs you now. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTAwMDkyNjcS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDY1NTg2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| It's coming down to the wire, friend -- and Jay needs you. So does our state. So does our movement. | Days until fundraising freeze: **2**

Most recent donation date: **Donation pending**

---
| [**CONTRIBUTE $5**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTAwMDkyNjcS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDY1NTg2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
With just two days until the fundraising freeze, I want to make sure you know why we're asking, now, for help.
This is a prove it or lose it moment for our progressive movement -- Jay's going to keep up the fight for climate action and for an economy that works for everyone -- including our most recent immigrants.
But he faces a divided state legislature and a national Republican leader who will stop at nothing to divide our country. We need to grow Governor Inslee's political power, and we need to do it now before he's legally barred from fundraising.
[**Will you contribute $5 today?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTAwMDkyNjcS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDY1NTg2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you.
Tracy Newman
[**CONTRIBUTE $5**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTAwMDkyNjcS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDY1NTg2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=10009267&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTA2MDY1NTg2NgS2&l=5611360&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible.

Seattle, WA 98111

name: ADD YOUR NAME (via DSCC)
subject: Trump's EPA pick did WHAT? [petition]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Donald Trump's pick to run the EPA is in... and it's an utter disaster for the environment! Now it's on us to do something about it... [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eecd/2b07114c/401661df/7368bb00/2775958284/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-epa?source=PT-20161208-AddYourName-ProsHV")
---
_**New York Times: Trump picks "ally of fossil fuel industry" to lead EPA**_
[**We can 't stand for this! Help Democrats OPPOSE Trump's choice >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eecd/2b07114c/401661df/7368bb00/2775958284/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-epa?source=PT-20161208-AddYourName-ProsHV")
Friend -- Donald Trump's pick to run the EPA is in... and he'll be an utter disaster for the environment!

Just look at Scott Pruitt's repugnant resume:

* Dismissed climate change science as "far from settled"
* Fought tooth-and-nail to defend oil companies
* Bragged about SUING the EPA over emissions rules (You read that right!)

The _New York Times_ says Trump's choice shows his "determination to dismantle President Obama's efforts." But what he doesn't know (among other things) is we're JUST as determined...**to STOP his anti-environment agenda every step of the way!**

[**ADD YOUR NAME: Tell Trump you won 't accept an EPA administrator that puts polluters' interests over ours. Let's get 50,000 supporters on the record today! **](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eecd/2b07114c/401661df/7368bb00/2775958284/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-epa?source=PT-20161208-AddYourName-ProsHV")

_**Your Action History:**_
**Name** : Friend
**Last Petition Signed** : N/A
**Denounce Trump's EPA pick** : [**signature needed >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eecd/2b07114c/401661df/7368bb00/2775958284/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-epa?source=PT-20161208-AddYourName-ProsHV")

Sen. Sanders is right: Trump's pick is "sad and dangerous" news for everyone who cares about our environment. _**But staying silent will only encourage him to escalate his attacks!**_

[**Don 't hold back, Friend -- Trump needs to hear from us NOW. Sign on and condemn his disastrous EPA pick before it's too late >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eecd/2b07114c/401661df/7368bb00/2775958284/VEsD/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-epa?source=PT-20161208-AddYourName-ProsHV")

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Keith Ellison & Bernie Sanders
body:
We need a leader who will prioritize young people and grassroots organizing.
#
Sisters and Brothers:
Keith Ellison is the right person to be the next leader of the Democratic Party, and next week Our Revolution is hosting a livestream event featuring Bernie Sanders and Keith Ellison to outline Keith's vision for the party.
If Democrats are going to win power to help advance a progressive agenda, we need a leader who will prioritize young people and grassroots organizing for the future of the Democratic Party. That's why our livestream event this Wednesday with Keith Ellison is something you need to see.
RSVP to watch this Wednesday's livestream event with Keith Ellison to talk about his platform for the Democratic Party's future.
[**Our Revolution Livestream with Keith Ellison and Bernie Sanders**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/bernie-and-keith?source=em161208-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/bernie-and-keith?source=em161208-full")
Wednesday, December 14, 2016
8:00pm ET
**[RSVP TO WATCH»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/bernie-and-keith?source=em161208-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/bernie-and-keith?source=em161208-full")**
The event will also include a call for unity from American Federation of Teachers President Randi Weingarten, who will stress the importance of coming together to oppose the Trump Administration.
This a crucial moment for the future of our country. We hope you'll join Bernie, Keith and Randi this Wednesday.
In solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Trump’s EPA and what it means for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
****The fox guarding the henhouse. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTAwMTgxNjQS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDc2MzU5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| | **" Scientists continue to disagree about the degree and extent of global warming and its connection to the actions of mankind."**

\- Scott Pruitt

---
| [**SIGN ON TO PROTEST TRUMP 'S EPA PICK »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTAwMTgxNjQS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDc2MzU5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
He wants to rip up the historic Paris climate accord. He doubts the facts behind man-made climate change. His name is Scott Pruitt, the Oklahoma attorney general, and now he's Donald Trump's pick to run the EPA.
Talk about a fox guarding a henhouse, friend.
I have news for Scott Pruitt and Donald Trump: Climate Change is real. It is man-made. And it is an imminent threat to our economy, our way of life, and our national security.
The climate action movement has never been more important, and that's where you and I come in! [**Add your name to denounce Scott Pruitt as Donald Trump 's pick to run the EPA.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTAwMTgxNjQS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDc2MzU5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Washington state is not going to stop leading the charge to combat climate change. As governor, I know it's an economic necessity and one of the top challenges of our lifetime. It's why I've led in Washington, across the country, and around the globe to build a clean energy economy that works for all of us.
Together, we've jump-started a revolution in the clean economy in Washington -- incentivizing clean energy projects, using our state's Clean Air Act to hold big polluters accountable, and establishing the Clean Energy Fund.
With President Obama leaving the White House and Donald Trump moving in, along with his friends like Scott Pruitt, our job is likely to get much harder -- and even more important.
I hope I'm wrong, but we must prepare for President Trump's administration rolling back our actions on climate. Scott Pruitt's nomination to head the EPA is just the latest signal from President-elect Trump that he's going to be hostile towards our climate action movement.
I want you to know right now that if they try to turn back our progress I will hold the Trump administration accountable. And I'm going to help lead the movement of other governors, activists, and scientists to continue moving forward on climate action. Always know how grateful I am to have you as part of our progressive movement, as part of my team. I count on your support and your passion more than you can ever know.
[**Sign on today and denounce Donald Trump for appointing the nation 's leading climate change denier to head the EPA -- our climate cannot afford Donald Trump's fox watching the henhouse.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTAwMTgxNjQS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDc2MzU5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
I know we're sending you a lot of emails this week. But appointments like this are why we must continue to build our political organization! Thank you for being part of it.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[**SIGN ON »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTAwMTgxNjQS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDc2MzU5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

clean_body: **The fox guarding the henhouse. | | " Scientists continue to disagree about the degree and extent of global warming and its connection to the actions of mankind."** \- Scott Pruitt | He wants to rip up the historic Paris climate accord. He doubts the facts behind man-made climate change. His name is Scott Pruitt, the Oklahoma attorney general, and now he's Donald Trump's pick to run the EPA. Talk about a fox guarding a henhouse, friend. I have news for Scott Pruitt and Donald Trump: Climate Change is real. It is man-made. And it is an imminent threat to our economy, our way of life, and our national security. The climate action movement has never been more important, and that's where you and I come in! Washington state is not going to stop leading the charge to combat climate change. As governor, I know it's an economic necessity and one of the top challenges of our lifetime. It's why I've led in Washington, across the country, and around the globe to build a clean energy economy that works for all of us. Together, we've jump-started a revolution in the clean economy in Washington -- incentivizing clean energy projects, using our state's Clean Air Act to hold big polluters accountable, and establishing the Clean Energy Fund. With President Obama leaving the White House and Donald Trump moving in, along with his friends like Scott Pruitt, our job is likely to get much harder -- and even more important. I hope I'm wrong, but we must prepare for President Trump's administration rolling back our actions on climate. Scott Pruitt's nomination to head the EPA is just the latest signal from President-elect Trump that he's going to be hostile towards our climate action movement. I want you to know right now that if they try to turn back our progress I will hold the Trump administration accountable. And I'm going to help lead the movement of other governors, activists, and scientists to continue moving forward on climate action. Always know how grateful I am to have you as part of our progressive movement, as part of my team. I count on your support and your passion more than you can ever know. I know we're sending you a lot of emails this week. But appointments like this are why we must continue to build our political organization! Thank you for being part of it. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. . Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible.
